evidence_summary: Execute a high-stakes vertical infiltration and theft sequence. The scene must emphasize the extreme height of the Zodangan barracks to establish danger, transitioning from the physical struggle of the climb to the tactical subdual of a sentry and the succe...

John Carter performs a dangerous climb up the exterior of the massive Zodangan barracks. He uses a grappling hook to reach the roof, subdues a sentry, and hangs him over the edge to buy time. He successfully retrieves two air machines from the machine sheds.
john_carter clinging to the exterior wall mid-climb.
john_carter securing two air machines on the roof.
